title: Argo CD Redis / Dex Dependency Health from Server Logs
dataSources: Argo CD API server / dex / redis sidecar logs (`sourcetype=argocd:server`)
app: Kubernetes container logs with sourcetype override
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:server"
| search "redis" OR "dex" OR "oidc"
| search "error" OR "failed" OR "timeout"
| stats count by host, coalesce(logger, component)
| where count>=5
| sort -count
description: Auth and session backends failing cause login loops and stalled UI/API operations.
value: Provides early warning when Dex or Redis saturation impacts GitOps operators.
implementation: Collect logs from `argocd-server`, `argocd-dex-server`, and Redis pods. Correlate with pod restarts.
visualization: Line chart (errors over time), Table (component × host).

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)
